word: G195 - ἀκρίβεια - akríbeia - ak-ree'-bi-ah - Perfect manner

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀκρίβεια

- Transliteration: Akribeia

- Phonetic: ak-ree'-bi-ah

- Definition:

1. exactness, exactest care: in accordance with the strictness of the Mosaic law

- Origin: from the same as G196

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From the same as G196; exactness: - perfect manner.
